decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures and then bring them back to the battlefield using the reanimation spells. The combo relies on using cards like Faithless Looting, Thought Scour, and Persist to efficiently discard creatures and set up the reanimation spells like Unearth. Archon of Cruelty, Abhorrent Oculus, and Emperor of Bones are powerful creatures that can be brought back from the graveyard to dominate the battlefield. This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big reanimated creatures and take control of the game.

The deck focuses on using Eldrazi creatures and ramp spells to control the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Emrakul, the Promised End and other powerful Eldrazi creatures are supported by Eldrazi Temple and other mana acceleration cards to quickly bring them into play. Kozilek's Command and Kozilek's Return provide removal and disruption, while Sowing Mycospawn and Malevolent Rumble help control the board. Ugin, Eye of the Storms offers additional control options, making it difficult for the opponent to establish a strong board presence. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm and outlast the opponent with its powerful Eldrazi creatures and control elements.

The deck focuses on efficiently assembling and executing a powerful combo involving Allosaurus Rider, Neoform, and Griselbrand to quickly generate enormous amounts of mana and draw through the deck to win the game in a single turn. By utilizing cards like Summoner's Pact, Eldritch Evolution, and Generous Ent to tutor the key pieces, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with large creatures like Ghalta, Stampede Tyrant and Xenagos, God of Revels, while also utilizing Pact of Negation and Veil of Summer for protection and disruption. The deck also includes additional utility cards like Planar Genesis and Consign to Memory to further support the game plan.

The deck focuses on aggressively attacking the opponent while also utilizing blink effects to reuse powerful enter-the-battlefield abilities. It combines creatures with strong abilities like Ocelot Pride and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd with cards like Ephemerate and Teferi, Time Raveler to maximize their impact. The deck also includes control elements like Spell Pierce and Prismatic Ending to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By blinking key creatures and controlling the board, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure a quick victory.

This deck relies on aggressive creatures with high power and toughness to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It also utilizes a mix of spells and enchantments to control the board and protect your creatures. The mana base includes a variety of lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana. Overall, the strategy of this deck is to establish a strong board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, board wipes, and removal spells while utilizing powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Teferi, Time Raveler to gain card advantage and control the opponent's resources. The deck also includes synergies like Isochron Scepter with Orim's Chant and Galvanic Discharge to further control the game. With a strong mana base and access to powerful spells like Supreme Verdict and Prismatic Ending, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a slow and methodical manner.

The deck is focused on fast-paced aggression using cheap spells to control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent. It utilizes efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler to apply pressure, while including versatile card selection and removal spells like Expressive Iteration and Lightning Bolt. The deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a combination of damage output and disruptive spells, ultimately securing victory through a proactive and aggressive game plan.

The key concept of this UR Aggro deck is to play aggressively and quickly, utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to deal damage to the opponent as fast as possible. The deck includes efficient creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to keep the pressure on. Expressive Iteration and Preordain help to dig for needed cards while Mishra's Bauble provides card advantage. Mutagenic Growth and Slickshot Show-Off provide additional ways to pump up creatures for even more damage, aiming to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up artifacts on the battlefield to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Cori-Steel Cutter are key creatures used to fuel the deck's engine, while cards like Urza's Saga and Mox Opal provide additional resources for explosive turns. With a mix of removal spells like Unholy Heat and Metallic Rebuke to control the board, the deck aims to establish a dominant board presence early in the game and maintain pressure on the opponent until victory.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's resources through counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating card advantage through cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Wan Shi Tong, Librarian. The deck also includes land destruction with Field of Ruin and a mix of creature removal with cards like Prismatic Ending and Solitude. The win condition is typically through card advantage and incremental advantage gained through controlling the game. The deck is designed to outvalue and outlast the opponent.

The deck focuses on quickly filling the graveyard with powerful creatures using cards like Faithless Looting and Thought Scour, before reanimating them with Persist or Unearth. The key concept is to assemble the pieces needed for a powerful combo, like using Psychic Frog to mill the opponent's deck or Archon of Cruelty to disrupt their hand. The deck also includes disruption spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the game while assembling the combo. Ultimately, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful reanimated creature to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to generate a large amount of mana quickly using cards like Desperate Ritual, Pyretic Ritual, and Ruby Medallion to cast powerful spells like Ral, Monsoon Mage and Past in Flames. The deck also utilizes cards like Wrenn's Resolve and Hex Magic to protect key combo pieces and generate card advantage. The end goal is to assemble a combination of cards that allows for a devastating Grapeshot or Wish combo to finish off the opponent in a single turn.

The deck focuses on utilizing Eldrazi creatures and powerful support cards to put pressure on opponents quickly and disrupt their game plan. By ramping with Eldrazi Temple and utilizing cards like Thought-Knot Seer to disrupt opponents' hands, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with large creatures like It That Heralds the End and Sire of Seven Deaths. The inclusion of cards like Chalice of the Void and All Is Dust further disrupt opponents' strategies, making it difficult for them to stabilize and counter the aggressive Eldrazi threats.

The key concept of this Boros Ponza Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's mana base with land destruction while controlling the board with removal spells and board wipes. The deck aims to establish dominance through a combination of resource denial, creature removal, and card advantage, ultimately leading to victory through overwhelming pressure and efficient use of its resources. It leverages its control elements to dictate the pace of the game and outvalue the opponent, while using its companion, Kaheera, the Orphanguard, to provide additional utility and consistency to its game plan.

This combo deck focuses on using graveyard recursion and sacrificing creatures to generate value and overwhelm opponents. The key strategy involves utilizing cards like Gravecrawler and Shambling Ghast in combination with sacrifice outlets like Marionette Apprentice and Warren Soultrader to continuously generate tokens and deal damage. Thoughtseize and Flare of Malice help disrupt opponents' game plans while Chthonian Nightmare can provide additional removal. The deck also includes a powerful finisher in Phoenix Fleet Airship to close out games. The mana base is optimized for consistency and the deck aims to win through a steady stream of incremental advantages.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly and aggressively play artifacts to power up cards like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch. This deck aims to control the board with cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke while also utilizing cards like Mishra's Bauble and Tormod's Crypt to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Urza's Saga and Weapons Manufacturing are key components for generating mana and building a threatening board presence. The deck is designed to overwhelm the opponent with powerful artifact creatures and disruptive spells to secure a win.
